name: EGB OE TL.Z./FRESENIUS SE
summary: Fresenius SE & Co. KGaA is a German healthcare company that provides a range of products and services for hospitals and outpatient care facilities. Its business segments include Fresenius Medical Care, Fresenius Kabi, Fresenius Helios, and Fresenius Vamed. The company is headquartered in Bad Homburg vor der Höhe, Germany.
